explanations.1: This is actually Python code, not PHP—it imports a diagramming library to create visual architecture drawings.
explanations.6: The 'show=False' parameter means the diagram will be created and saved to a file, but won't automatically pop open in your browser.
explanations.15: The minus signs and arrows here aren't math—they're special operators that tell the diagram library how to draw connections between the components.
explanations.16: The '>>' operator chains the connections together, and 'append' adds each completed chain to the list so we can reference it later.
explanations.18: The '<<' operator points in the opposite direction compared to '>>', showing that the storage class feeds into the persistent volume.
